rationale: Re-instantiate every `forall`-ensures conjunct of `alloc_and_map` once with explicit triggers tied to `post1_self_`/`r1` and once with triggers tied to `post2_self_`/`r2`, plus the scalar ensures (`proc_dom`, `thread_dom`, `endpoint_dom`, `container_dom`, `get_num_of_free_pages`, `page_mapping@.dom()`, address-space insert, quota subtract). Each assertion is a direct restatement of one original ensures conjunct, so Verus discharges it; the matching triggers force z3 to align the two runs and let it close `det_alloc_and_map_equal` on the deterministic components via Set/Map extensionality (`=~=`) and pointwise equality through `pre_self_`.
